entries.summary: Fixed Google sign-in: added port 5174 to CORS_ALLOWED_ORIGINS. User also needs to add http://localhost:5174 to Google Cloud Console authorized origins.
entries.details: settings.py CORS was missing port 5174 (Ignite dev server). Google Cloud Console origins need http://localhost:5174 added. Backend GOOGLE_CLIENT_ID matches frontend VITE_GOOGLE_CLIENT_ID.
decisions: User must also update Google Cloud Console origins
